title: E-ZPass signup (first screens)
description: Partial recording covering navigation through first verification code.

steps.title: I navigate to the main application page.
I enter "john@email.com" into the element "role:textbox[name='Email or Mobile Number']".
I click on the element "role:button[name='Verify'; exact=true]".
I click on the element "role:button[name='Continue'; exact=true]".
